hero.subtext: Take absolute control of your art direction. Enter your data with surgical precision and generate hundreds of media assets of unmatched quality.

socialProof.title: Powered by the infrastructure of giants.

features.c1Desc: No blind imports. You decide every pixel and every variable manually for a perfect render.
features.c2Desc: Every video is assembled frame by frame. Artisanal quality, powered at industrial scale.
features.c3Desc: No toxic subscription. Buy Sparks, create your videos with total creative freedom.

process.title: Your workflow, elevated.
process.step1Desc: Enter every variable manually to ensure flawless quality.
process.step2Desc: Lumina deploys a fleet of instances to render your media simultaneously.
process.step3Desc: Your HD images and videos are ready and securely archived.

testimonials.title: Loved by demanding creators.
testimonials.feedback1: "The level of manual control Lumina offers ensures our brand guidelines are never compromised. It's masterful work."
testimonials.feedback2: "No more waiting hours. The precision and speed are remarkable."
testimonials.feedback3: "We abandoned mass automation to return to manual control via Lumina. Quality skyrocketed."

pricing.title: Gain speed, not just money.
pricing.note: 1 Spark = 1 Media (Image or Video). No subscription: pay only what you use. Your Sparks never expire.
pricing.globalAdv1: Non-expiring Sparks: Use them at your own pace.
pricing.globalAdv2: Pro quality included in every generation.
pricing.p2Stat: Cut your production time by 50×. From idea to ad in 5 minutes.

comparison.title: The choice of raw performance.
comparison.footer: With others, a mistake on a video costs you a new generation. With Lumina, it costs you 3 seconds of free editing.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions.
faq.q1: How does the Sparks system work?
faq.a1: Simple: 1 Spark equals 1 fully generated media, with no extra charges.
faq.a2: Absolutely. Your assets are stored on encrypted S3 storage and automatically deleted after 15 days.
faq.q3: Can I manually edit each asset?
faq.a3: Yes. Lumina prioritises manual control for total precision of your art direction.
faq.a4: Thanks to our AWS Lambda architecture, most of your videos are generated in a few seconds, even for large batches.
faq.a5: Yes. You receive 5 free generations (Sparks) when you create your account to test the technology.

cta.title: Ready to revolutionise your video production?
cta.offer: Try Lumina for free. 5 Sparks gifted on account creation.

search.emptyStateLink: Report a bug or ask a question

intro.title: The batch render revolution
intro.description: Lumina was designed for one mission: eliminate the bottleneck of video production. Where a creator spends 5 hours manually exporting 100 variants, Lumina does it in 150 seconds. Using the raw power of the AWS cloud, we offer a parallel render factory accessible without any technical skills.

getting_started.title: Getting Started
getting_started.a1: Lumina is a batch video rendering SaaS. You enter your data, we generate hundreds of videos simultaneously via AWS Lambda.
getting_started.q2: How do I launch my first batch?
getting_started.a2: Fill in the required fields in your dashboard, preview a sample, and click 'Launch render'.
getting_started.q3: Is there a video limit per batch?
getting_started.a3: Currently, you can launch up to 10 videos per batch to guarantee maximum stability.

tokens.title: Sparks & Pricing
tokens.q1: How does the Sparks system work?
tokens.a1: 1 Spark = 1 successfully generated media. Sparks are only deducted when the render is complete.
tokens.a2: No. Once purchased, your Sparks remain on your Lumina account forever.
tokens.q3: Can I get a Sparks refund?
tokens.a3: Purchased Sparks are non-refundable, but they have no expiry date.
tokens.q4: How do I get the 5 free Sparks?
tokens.a4: They are automatically credited to your account upon registration so you can test the factory.

technical.title: Technical & Rendering
technical.a1: We currently support Full HD (1080p) format. 4K support is coming soon for Business packs.
technical.a2: This is the average processing time by our cloud architecture for each individual media within a batch.
technical.q3: What file formats can I download?
technical.a3: Your renders are available in MP4 (H.264) format for maximum compatibility across all social networks.
technical.q4: Why is there no CSV import?
technical.a4: Lumina prioritises manual control to guarantee surgical precision on every data entry.

security.title: Security & Privacy
security.q1: How long are my files kept?
security.a1: Your renders are kept on our servers for 15 days. After that, they are permanently deleted.
security.a2: This allows us to keep costs low for you and guarantee maximum security by not storing your data indefinitely.
security.a3: Never. Your assets and render data are encrypted and strictly reserved for your personal use.

support.title: Account & Support
support.q1: How do I delete my account?
support.a1: In your settings, click 'Delete my account'. This will instantly erase all your data and S3 renders.
support.q2: I found a bug, what should I do?
support.a2: Use our dedicated 'Report a bug' page to send us the technical details.

bug.title: Report an issue
bug.subtitle: A problem? Our engineers analyse every report within 24h.

urgency.label: Urgency level
urgency.high: Blocking — I can no longer work

subject.label: Report subject
subject.placeholder: e.g. The download button doesn't respond

steps.label: Steps to reproduce (Crucial)
steps.placeholder: 1. I opened Studio... 2. I clicked on... 3. The error appeared...

upload.label: Screenshot or video of the bug

form.success: Report sent successfully! We'll get back to you soon.

errors.batchRequired: Batch ID is required for rendering issues
